{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152445301248D8C8CB746F6B33"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611392010637050649","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者具备一定的文学功底，文笔细腻，结构合理……。这是继“废物铁丝网”之后难得的谍战好书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772168105,"group_id":"7588829075729304600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx08AhHztAiHiZZuxULTR4h13hj6rU31Ov543hEiL5QN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4248943171214664","user_name":"爱吃茴香不吃韭菜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4248943171214664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588829075729304600","book_info":{"abstract":"一场车祸，心理学系大学生沈青云魂穿1939年，成了军统审讯科记录员。

戴老板闻讯，甚为赏识。
